title: Seiko 5 Sports SRPD Series
desc: The definitive modern entry to automatic horology. We chose the SRPD for its bulletproof NH36 movement and the legendary 4 o'clock crown. Note: It gains/loses a few seconds daily — that's mechanical charm, not a defect.

title: Invicta Pro Diver 5053
desc: Powered by Seiko's NH35a automatic calibre with a genuinely tested 200m water resistance. A classic, high-contrast coin-edge bezel dive watch that punches way above its price tag for daily wear.

title: Citizen Eco-Drive Chandler
desc: The ultimate set-it-and-forget-it military field watch. Powered by any light source via Citizen's legendary Eco-Drive tech. Features a rugged canvas strap and zero battery maintenance required.

title: Casio G-Shock GA-2100 'CasiOak'
desc: An absolute icon in modern watch design. Features the legendary G-Shock shock resistance wrapped in a slim, octagonal carbon core guard structure. The indestructible daily beater for minimalists.
